en.extract:
The Huallaga tanager (Ramphocelus melanogaster) or black-bellied tanager, is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is endemic to Peru.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and heavily degraded former forest.

The '''Huallaga tanager''' ('''''Ramphocelus melanogaster''''') or '''black-bellied tanager''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].
It is [[endemic]] to [[Peru]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and heavily degraded former forest.
